text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer! We gotta start training, pronto!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I was so close to first place! Which means I need
to train even harder for the next race!
choice_data_list: Why don't we review today's race first?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You're right! I gave it my best shot and put up a
good fight!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: And now, I'd like to run off into the sunset!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Gaaahhh! That's it! I can't take it anymore! I'm
gonna run to the river real quick!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sure! Except, I can't possibly sit still right now!
choice_data_list:
If we don't talk about it, you'll make the same
mistakes again.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right! Then let's do it while I lift some weights!
